title: HG laminate cleaner shine restorer (product 73) 1L
features: • A laminate wash and shine formula which gives a wonderful glossy shine to laminate flooring
• Can be used regularly on all types of laminate flooring
• Safe and fast laminate shine cleaner which cleans and polishes at the same time
description: From the manufacturer Quick and effective cleaning and protecting of laminate floors. HG laminate protector, Product 70 This unique and easy to apply polymer emulsion forms a wafer-thin glossy coating to protect your laminate floors. HG laminate cleaner shine restorer, Product 73 This fresh-smelling concentrated floor cleaner can be used on all floor types for quick and easy cleaning to bring a shine to your floors. HG laminate cleaner extra strong, Product 74 Remove stubborn dirt and grease easily with this powerful laminate floor cleaner. How to use HG laminate protector Do not shake before use. Use a wax spreader to spread the product undiluted, thinly and evenly over the laminate floor in one direction. Then leave to dry, after which a second layer of the product may be applied crosswise onto the first layer after 60 minutes. The floor can be walked on about 1 to 2 hours after the final treatment and has completely hardened after 3 days. How to use HG laminate cleaner shine restorer Dissolve 50ml (half a cup) of the product in half a bucket (5L) of lukewarm water. For more intensive soiling, a stronger solution can be made of 100 ml (1 cup) of the product to half a bucket of water. Clean the floor with a wrung-out mop or floor cloth, regularly rinsing it in the cleaning solution. Do not rinse or mop dry, simply leave the floor to dry on its own. How to use HG laminate cleaner extra strong Dissolve 1L of the product in half a bucket (5L) of lukewarm water. Apply this with a properly wrung-out mop or floor cloth. Rinse it regularly in the solution. Do not rinse or mop dry, simply leave the floor to dry on its own.
